verification_commands: jq '{status, target_pair_rows, candidate_rows, observation_seed_rows, audit_rows, materializer_gate_passed, primary_blocker, next_task}' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_v1/goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_summary.json

comm -23 <(jq -r '. as $r | .candidate_ids[] | [$r.scene_key,$r.query,.] | @tsv' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_v1/goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_observation_seed_rows.jsonl | sort -u) <(jq -r '. as $r | .candidates[] | [$r.scene_key,$r.query,.candidate_id] | @tsv' local_dataset/runs/h001_expanded_retrieval_paper_scale_local_context_plan_v1/expanded_retrieval_local_context_candidate_artifact.jsonl | sort -u) | wc -l

docker run --rm --ipc=host --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/hypothesis/CAND-01/H001_uncertainty-reobservation/runtime -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace:ro -w /workspace research3/habitat-h001:20260508-calib-artifacts /opt/conda/bin/python -B -m py_compile hypothesis/CAND-01/H001_uncertainty-reobservation/runtime/h001_runtime/plan_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_frame_projection.py

jq '{frame_plan_rows, skipped_rows, candidate_artifact_rows, candidate_tuple_required, candidate_tuple_covered, candidate_tuple_missing, observation_role_counts, evidence_axis_counts, nonterminal_action_counts, gate, uses_gt_for_action_true_rows, paper_claim_allowed_true_rows}' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_frame_plan_v1/goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_frame_plan_summary.json

jq '{ok, rows_requested, rows_exported, rendered_heading_count, min_headings_per_row, max_headings_per_row, uses_gt_for_action}' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_frames_v1/summary.json

jq '{input_rows, output_rows, row_level_nonblank_gate_passed, strict_no_blank_heading_gate_passed, removed_blank_heading_count, kept_heading_count, original_heading_count, uses_gt_for_action, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_frames_v1/nonblank_filter_v1/nonblank_frame_filter_summary.json

jq '{rows, expected_rows, projection_anchor_visible_rows, projection_anchor_visible_rate, missing_candidate_rows, candidate_selection_source_counts, gt_action_rows, gate, uses_gt_for_action, uses_gt_for_analysis, paper_claim_allowed}' local_dataset/runs/h001_goal_region_object_relation_coverage_completion_projection_v1/projection_anchor_smoke_summary.json

interpretation.fact: The Docker smoke resolves 48 coverage-completion observation seed rows into 48 frame-plan rows, exports 48 frame rows with 307 rendered headings, keeps 48 nonblank rows with 304 headings after removing 3 blank headings, and passes projection-anchor smoke with 48/48 visible rows.
interpretation.agent_inference: Passing this gate means the missing goal-region/object-relation observation branch is renderable and projection-visible enough to freeze a detector/SAM2 substrate contract. It still does not validate detector evidence, wrong-goal reduction, wasted-path reduction, map/pose consistency utility, or terminal utility.
interpretation.paper_claim: No ObjectNav improvement, Semantic-SLAM complementarity, terminal utility, formula revision, first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, Step 4-5 promotion, or paper claim is allowed from this frame/projection smoke.
